event_title: October 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
title: October 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
description: The October Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, October 10, from 6:00pm to 8:00pm. This meetup will be hosted by SET at 58 Maiden Lane, San Francisco, CA (5th floor). As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome. Event schedule: 6:00pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8:00pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of SET. Please use door code 2718# to gain entry to the building. We'll be on the 5th floor.
